title: polystichopsis simplicior
intro: Polystichopsis simplicior, also known as the Chinese maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichopsis simplicior include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
